title: Villager King
description: Mod that adds a custom skin villager king, if you or somebody hits him, he will launch special arrows
body:
**This mod adds a villager king that when generated will create a village, if you or someone attack him, he will launch multiple fire arrows in the diretion he is pointing at. So, be smart an attack from behind!**


## Compatibility🔗
Be happy because this mod is compatible with every other mod :D !

## Copyrights ©
This mod have All rights reserved lincense
but you can make videos `bout it, of course
